info.name: InsuranceIntegration.Api
info.description: Curated Postman collection for the InsuranceIntegration.Api service. Mirrors the scenarios in docs/API_EXAMPLES.md. Set `baseUrl` in the matching environment file (defaults to http://localhost:5000). Each request injects a fresh `X-Correlation-Id` via the collection-level pre-request script so log scopes are unique per send.

exec: // Generate a fresh correlation id per request so logs can be traced
// Generate a fresh envelope id per send (used by ingest requests)
pm.test('Response is an IngestReceipt with self link', () => {

request.description: Returns the persisted IngestReceipt for the supplied (source, envelopeId) key. Set the `lookupSource` and `lookupEnvelopeId` collection variables (auto-set by the first POST in 'Ingest - Risk' via its Tests script) or override per request.

item.name: POST /api/v1/ingest - Claim Notice (Windstorm with deductible & limit)

body.raw:
{
  "externalReference": "EXT-AUTOCLEAR-0001",
  "productCode": "COMMERCIAL_PROPERTY",
  "sourceSystem": "BROKER_PORTAL",
  "transactionType": "Submission",
  "schemeCode": "STANDARD",
  "transactionTimestampUtc": "{{nowUtc}}",
  "annualizedGrossPremium": 1000.00,
  "currencyCode": "USD",
  "submission": {
    "underwritingYear": 2026,
    "channelCode": "Digital",
    "brokerPremium": 1000.00,
    "technicalPremium": 950.00,
    "revenue": 500000.00,
    "isRenewal": false
  },
  "broker": {
    "brokerCode": "BRK-100",
    "brokerName": "Summit Risk Partners",
    "hasDelegatedAuthority": false,
    "isPreferredPartner": true
  },
  "insured": {
    "fullName": "Northwind Storage Ltd",
    "tradingName": "Northwind Storage",
    "segmentCode": "SME",
    "annualRevenue": 500000.00,
    "employeeCount": 20,
    "yearsInBusiness": 5
  },
  "quote": {
    "quoteReference": "QT-2001",
    "effectiveDate": "2026-05-01",
    "expiryDate": "2027-04-30",
    "quoteStatusHint": "Indicative"
  },
  "policy": {},
  "clearance": {
    "autoClearanceEnabled": true,
    "premiumThreshold": 5000.00,
    "fuzzyMatchTolerance": 3
  },
  "enrichments": [
    { "family": "Universal", "code": "TRIAGE_STANDARD", "description": "Universal triage baseline", "multiplier": 1.02, "isBlocking": false, "isDerived": false }
  ],
  "contractChecks": [ { "code": "CONTRACT_SIGNALS", "isComplete": true } ],
  "complianceChecks": [ { "code": "KYC_BASELINE", "isComplete": true } ],
  "parties": [ { "role": "Insured", "name": "Northwind Storage Ltd" } ],
  "claims": [
    { "claimReference": "CLM-100", "claimantName": "Northwind Storage Ltd", "incurredAmount": 500.00, "reservedAmount": 100.00 }
  ],
  "sections": [
    {
      "sectionCode": "PROP",
      "sectionName": "Property Damage",
      "status": "Active",
      "sumInsured": 750000.00,
      "sectionPremium": 1000.00,
      "warranties": [ "Fire suppression system serviced annually", "Burglar alarm operational outside business hours" ],
      "specialConditions": [ "Subject to satisfactory survey within 60 days" ],
      "subcovers": [
        {
          "subcoverCode": "FIRE",
          "subcoverName": "Fire and Allied Perils",
          "sumInsured": 750000.00,
          "perOccurrenceLimit": 750000.00,
          "aggregateLimit": 1500000.00,
          "deductible": 1000.00,
          "deductibleType": "Flat",
          "premium": 1000.00,
          "perils": [
            { "code": "FIRE", "name": "Fire", "isCovered": true, "subLimit": 750000.00 },
            { "code": "LIGHTNING", "name": "Lightning", "isCovered": true, "subLimit": 250000.00 },
            { "code": "EXPLOSION", "name": "Explosion", "isCovered": true, "subLimit": 500000.00 },
            { "code": "FLOOD", "name": "Flood", "isCovered": false }
          ],
          "exclusions": [ "EARTHQUAKE", "WAR" ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "sectionOperations": [ { "sectionCode": "PROP", "operationType": "AddSection" } ],
  "installments": [ { "sequenceNumber": 1, "dueDate": "2026-06-01", "amount": 500.00, "isPaid": false } ]
}

item.name: POST /api/v1/policies/renewals - Standard with +20% exposure and +5% override
Snapshots
item.description: Consolidated read-model views per business key. Each Risk-domain ingest contributes to a QuoteSnapshot (and a PolicySnapshot once a bind event arrives). Run the three requests in 'Snapshot pipeline demo' in order, then the GET requests will resolve POL-DEMO-001 / QT-DEMO-001.

request.description: Step 1/3 — establishes the QuoteSnapshot for QT-DEMO-001 with the Contoso view (insured + premium hint).
Step 2/3 — enriches the QuoteSnapshot for QT-DEMO-001 with broker info and confirmed premium. Same key, growing document.
Step 3/3 — creates PolicySnapshot for POL-DEMO-001 and marks QuoteSnapshot QT-DEMO-001 as bound.
Returns the consolidated PolicySnapshot for POL-DEMO-001 once step 3 has run.
Returns the consolidated QuoteSnapshot for QT-DEMO-001. Run all three demo POSTs and the history array should contain entries from CONTOSO_UW, QUOTEFORGE, and BINDPOINT.

Replay every DomainEvent for POL-DEMO-001 through the projector and return the rebuilt PolicySnapshot. Useful as a sanity check against GET /api/v1/policies/POL-DEMO-001 after a sequence of cancel / endorse / renew operations.

Replay every DomainEvent for QT-DEMO-001 through the QuoteSnapshotProjector. After the 3-event pipeline demo this returns Version=2 (RiskSubmission + QuoteRequest both bumped Version), IsBound=true, and ValidUntilUtc populated.
